headline: Debt-Funded Buyback Could Be A Game Changer For Fair Isaac (FICO)
summary: In early June 2026, Fair Isaac Corporation amended its credit agreement to add a US$1.50 billion unsecured term loan maturing in 2028, using the proceeds to fund an accelerated share repurchase under a newly authorized US$2.00 billion buyback program. This decision to raise debt specifically for repurchases highlights management’s emphasis on capital returns and balance sheet flexibility at a time of ongoing product and partnership expansion. Next, we’ll examine how funding a large buyback...
